---
title: "Réseau hydrographique SLSO — Carte interactive"
author: "Essi Parent"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  echo: true
---

Carte interactive du réseau de tronçons : noeuds, connexions amont→aval (flèches
sur les cours principaux), lacs, et stations hydrométriques.

```{python}
#| label: setup
import os
os.chdir("C:/Users/parse01/documents-locaux/GitHub/meandre")

import json
import tomllib
from pathlib import Path

import duckdb
import folium
import folium.plugins as fplugins
import matplotlib.cm as cm
import matplotlib.colors as mcolors
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

CONFIG = Path("notebooks/slso/config/slso.toml")
with open(CONFIG, "rb") as f:
    cfg = tomllib.load(f)

DB_PATH = cfg["paths"]["basin_db"]
```

```{python}
#| label: load-db
con = duckdb.connect(DB_PATH, read_only=True)
tables = [r[0] for r in con.execute("SHOW TABLES").fetchall()]

nodes_df = con.execute(
    "SELECT node_idx, node_id, lon, lat, CAST(is_lake AS BOOLEAN) AS is_lake, topo_order FROM nodes ORDER BY node_idx"
).df()

edges_df = con.execute(
    "SELECT src, dst, travel_time_days FROM edges"
).df()

stations_df = (
    con.execute("SELECT station_id, node_idx, lon, lat, drainage_area_km2 FROM gauging_stations").df()
    if "stations" in tables else pd.DataFrame()
)

con.close()

n_nodes = len(nodes_df)
n_edges = len(edges_df)
print(f"Noeuds : {n_nodes}   Arêtes : {n_edges}   Stations : {len(stations_df)}")
print(f"Lacs   : {nodes_df['is_lake'].sum()}")
print(f"Ordre topo — min={nodes_df['topo_order'].min()}  max={nodes_df['topo_order'].max()}")
```

```{python}
#| label: build-map

# ── Colormap topo_order : bleu clair (tête) → bleu foncé (aval) ──────────
topo_min = int(nodes_df["topo_order"].min())
topo_max = int(nodes_df["topo_order"].max())
_cmap = cm.get_cmap("PuBu")

def _topo_color(topo_order: int) -> str:
    t = (topo_order - topo_min) / max(topo_max - topo_min, 1)
    return mcolors.to_hex(_cmap(t))

# ── Exclure le nœud exutoire théorique (topo_order max) de l'affichage ────
outlet_idx = int(nodes_df.loc[nodes_df["topo_order"].idxmax(), "node_idx"])
# On garde les coordonnées de l'exutoire pour tracer les arêtes, mais on
# l'exclut des nœuds affichés sur la carte.
_xy_all = nodes_df.set_index("node_idx")[["lon", "lat"]]
nodes_df = nodes_df[nodes_df["node_idx"] != outlet_idx]

# ── Coordonnées source/destination des arêtes ─────────────────────────────
_xy = _xy_all
edges_df = edges_df.join(_xy.rename(columns={"lon": "lon_src", "lat": "lat_src"}), on="src")
edges_df = edges_df.join(_xy.rename(columns={"lon": "lon_dst", "lat": "lat_dst"}), on="dst")
edges_df = edges_df.dropna(subset=["lon_src", "lon_dst"])

# ── Carte Folium ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
center_lat = nodes_df["lat"].mean()
center_lon = nodes_df["lon"].mean()

m = folium.Map(
    location=[center_lat, center_lon],
    zoom_start=8,
    tiles="CartoDB positron",
    prefer_canvas=False,
)

# Couches séparées pour le contrôle de légende
fg_edges    = folium.FeatureGroup(name="Réseau (arêtes)", show=True)
fg_nodes    = folium.FeatureGroup(name="Noeuds", show=True)
fg_lakes    = folium.FeatureGroup(name="Lacs / réservoirs", show=True)
fg_stations = folium.FeatureGroup(name="Stations hydrométriques", show=True)

# ── 1. Arêtes avec pointe de flèche via PolyLine ─────────────────────────
# Lookup rapide topo_order par node_idx
_topo_lookup = _xy_all.join(
    nodes_df.set_index("node_idx")[["topo_order"]], how="left"
)["topo_order"].to_dict()

edge_features = []
for _, row in edges_df.iterrows():
    src_topo = _topo_lookup.get(row["src"], topo_min)
    edge_features.append({
        "type": "Feature",
        "geometry": {
            "type": "LineString",
            "coordinates": [
                [float(row["lon_src"]), float(row["lat_src"])],
                [float(row["lon_dst"]), float(row["lat_dst"])],
            ],
        },
        "properties": {
            "src": int(row["src"]),
            "dst": int(row["dst"]),
            "travel_time": int(row["travel_time_days"]),
            "color": _topo_color(int(src_topo)),
            "topo_norm": (int(src_topo) - topo_min) / max(topo_max - topo_min, 1),
        },
    })

folium.GeoJson(
    {"type": "FeatureCollection", "features": edge_features},
    style_function=lambda f: {
        "color":   f["properties"]["color"],
        "weight":  0.5 + 2.5 * f["properties"]["topo_norm"],
        "opacity": 0.7,
    },
    tooltip=folium.GeoJsonTooltip(
        fields=["src", "dst", "travel_time"],
        aliases=["Amont →", "→ Aval", "Temps de transit (j)"],
        localize=True,
    ),
).add_to(fg_edges)

# ── 3. Noeuds réguliers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
regular_nodes = nodes_df[~nodes_df["is_lake"]]
node_features = []
for _, row in regular_nodes.iterrows():
    node_features.append({
        "type": "Feature",
        "geometry": {
            "type": "Point",
            "coordinates": [float(row["lon"]), float(row["lat"])],
        },
        "properties": {
            "node_idx":   int(row["node_idx"]),
            "node_id":    str(row["node_id"]),
            "topo_order": int(row["topo_order"]),
            "color":      _topo_color(int(row["topo_order"])),
        },
    })

folium.GeoJson(
    {"type": "FeatureCollection", "features": node_features},
    marker=folium.CircleMarker(radius=3, fill=True, fill_opacity=0.8),
    style_function=lambda f: {
        "color":       f["properties"]["color"],
        "fillColor":   f["properties"]["color"],
        "fillOpacity": 0.85,
        "weight":      0,
        "radius":      3,
    },
    tooltip=folium.GeoJsonTooltip(
        fields=["node_idx", "node_id", "topo_order"],
        aliases=["Nœud #", "ID", "Ordre topo"],
    ),
).add_to(fg_nodes)

# ── 4. Lacs / réservoirs ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
lake_nodes = nodes_df[nodes_df["is_lake"]]
for _, row in lake_nodes.iterrows():
    folium.CircleMarker(
        location=[float(row["lat"]), float(row["lon"])],
        radius=8,
        color="#225ea8",
        fill=True,
        fill_color="#41b6c4",
        fill_opacity=0.9,
        weight=2,
        tooltip=(f"Lac/réservoir — nœud {int(row['node_idx'])} | "
                 f"ID={row['node_id']} | topo={int(row['topo_order'])}"),
    ).add_to(fg_lakes)

# ── 5. Stations hydrométriques ────────────────────────────────────────────
for _, row in stations_df.iterrows():
    folium.Marker(
        location=[float(row["lat"]), float(row["lon"])],
        icon=folium.Icon(color="red", icon="tint", prefix="fa"),
        tooltip=(f"Station {row['station_id']} — nœud {int(row['node_idx'])} | "
                 f"Aire drainée : {row['drainage_area_km2']:.0f} km²"),
        popup=folium.Popup(
            f"<b>{row['station_id']}</b><br>"
            f"Nœud : {int(row['node_idx'])}<br>"
            f"Aire : {row['drainage_area_km2']:.0f} km²",
            max_width=200,
        ),
    ).add_to(fg_stations)

# ── Assemblage ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
for fg in [fg_edges, fg_nodes, fg_lakes, fg_stations]:
    fg.add_to(m)

folium.LayerControl(collapsed=False).add_to(m)

# Légende colormap topo_order
legend_html = """
<div style="position:fixed; bottom:30px; left:30px; z-index:1000;
            background:white; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:6px;
            box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); font-size:12px; line-height:1.6;">
  <b>Ordre topologique</b><br>
  <span style="color:#bdc9e1">■</span> Tête de bassin (amont)<br>
  <span style="color:#74a9cf">■</span> Cours moyen<br>
  <span style="color:#023858">■</span> Exutoire (aval)<br>
  <span style="color:#41b6c4">●</span> Lac / réservoir<br>
  <span style="color:red">●</span> Station hydrométrique
</div>
"""
m.get_root().html.add_child(folium.Element(legend_html))

m
```


```{python}

```
